packages.name: Growth Intelligence Audit
packages.tagline: Find Out Exactly Where You're Losing Leads
packages.description: A senior-level review of your entire lead generation and follow-up system. You leave with a clear, prioritized action plan — not a generic report.
features: Full audit of your ads, forms, and landing pages
Follow-up process and response time assessment
Automation gap and tool stack review
Lead quality and qualification analysis
Funnel drop-off identification
Written Growth Roadmap with prioritized next steps
60-minute strategy call to walk through findings
ideal: Businesses unsure where leads are being lost
Teams spending money on ads without clear results
Owners who want a clear starting point before investing in a full system
packages.guarantee: If you don't walk away with at least 3 actionable improvements, we'll refund you.

packages.name: Booked Appointment Engine
packages.tagline: A Complete System From First Click to Confirmed Appointment
packages.description: We build your entire lead-to-booking system — ads, qualification, automation, routing, and follow-up — so inquiries convert into appointments without manual effort.
features: Meta Lead Ads campaign strategy and setup
Landing page build or optimization for your lead funnel
Lead form with multi-step qualification logic
Google Sheets or CRM lead routing and tagging
Automated email and SMS follow-up sequences
Missed lead recovery workflow
Appointment and tour confirmation automation
Lead quality reporting dashboard
30-day post-launch optimization support
ideal: Schools, daycares, and small businesses ready to build a complete lead system
Businesses currently losing leads due to slow or missing follow-up
Owners who want automation handling follow-up instead of doing it manually
packages.guarantee: We build until it works. Includes revisions through the first 30 days.

packages.name: Fractional Growth Partner
packages.tagline: Senior Growth Expertise Without a Full-Time Hire
packages.description: Ongoing strategy, optimization, and execution from a dedicated growth partner. We run your lead system, improve performance month over month, and report on what actually matters.
features: Dedicated growth partner — not an account manager
Monthly campaign and funnel performance review
Continuous automation workflow improvements
Cost-per-lead and lead quality tracking
Funnel drop-off analysis and optimization
New workflow builds as your business grows
Bi-weekly strategy and reporting calls
Priority support with same-day response
ideal: Businesses with an existing funnel that want continuous improvement
Owners who want expert oversight without hiring full-time
Teams that need consistent reporting and optimization month over month
packages.guarantee: Cancel anytime. No long-term contracts required.

deliverables: Full documentation of your growth system
Lead tracking setup via Google Sheets or CRM
process: Audit — review your current setup and identify gaps
Build — create your funnel, workflows, and tracking
Automate — connect lead sources to follow-up systems
Optimize — monitor performance and improve over time
